Read and analyze all documents related to the CPF queue spike:

1. First read the spike specification: `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.claude/specs/CPF_QUEUE_CBILL.md`

2. Then find and read ALL solution versions in `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.claude/internal-docs/` - there should be multiple SOLUTION_V*.md files

For each document, extract:
- Main approach proposed
- Key architectural decisions
- AWS services involved
- Pros and cons mentioned

Provide a comprehensive summary comparing all versions, highlighting what evolved between them and what the final recommended approach was.

content.content:
1вҶ’# Automatizar a inclusГЈo de CPF(s) na fila (IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade)
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Esta Г© uma tarefa de arquitetura aonde a entrega Г© uma documentaГ§ГЈo de soluГ§ГЈo robusta.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**Objetivo**
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’Desenhar soluГ§ГЈo para automatizar o reprocessamento de postagens de promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade que falharam na integraГ§ГЈo com o CBILL (single source of truth financeiro).
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’**Contexto**
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’Clientes que atingem a mГ©dia de gasto do plano contratado recebem uma promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade. O fluxo atual (ver diagrama abaixo) segue este caminho:
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’![spike-cpf-queue__queue-0001.png](../assets/spike-cpf-queue__queue-0001.png)
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’1. O Data Lake (Afinz) identifica os clientes elegГӯveis e publica na fila **SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade**.
    17вҶ’2. A funГ§ГЈo **NTS-APP-Fintech-FeeExemption** consome a fila e executa 3 chamadas GraphQL ao CBILL (on-premises):
    18вҶ’    - Obter o NRC a partir do CPF
    19вҶ’    - Obter o ponto de acesso a partir do NRC
    20вҶ’    - Postar a promoГ§ГЈo
    21вҶ’3. Em caso de erro, a mensagem Г© reenfileirada atГ© **X tentativas** (parametrizГЎvel).
    22вҶ’4. Excedidas as tentativas, a mensagem vai para a **SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade_DLQ** e uma **Step Function** dispara e-mail Г  squad FГӘnix com os detalhes do erro.
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’**Problema**
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’ApГіs a squad identificar e resolver a causa-raiz do erro, o reprocessamento hoje Г© **manual**: Г© necessГЎrio abrir um chamado para o time do CBILL reprocessar os CPFs afetados. NГЈo existe mecanismo automatizado para resubmeter as mensagens da DLQ.
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’**Objetivo da Spike**
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’Projetar uma soluГ§ГЈo que permita reprocessar automaticamente (ou com mГӯnima intervenГ§ГЈo) um ou mais CPFs que falharam, eliminando a dependГӘncia de chamado manual ao CBILL.
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’**RestriГ§ГЈo conhecida**
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’A fila DLQ possui TTL de **14 dias** (configuraГ§ГЈo AWS). Mensagens nГЈo reprocessadas dentro desse prazo sГЈo perdidas.
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’---
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’A Гәltima versГЈo sempre Г© teoricamente a mais correta, porГ©m estilo direto da primeira Г© mais adequado, pois nГЈo Г© uma tarefa tГЈo complexa quanto a se fez parecer em algumas versГөes.
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’A soluГ§ГЈo escrita deve sucinta e sem nenhum fato reference ao histГіrico de versГөes e de modo que pareca natural e nГЈo AI. NГЈo deve ser longo nem extremamente detalhado, pois o serviГ§o jГЎ existe, precisamos apenas corrigir ou recriar a arquitetura (dependendo do plano mais adequado), Г© algo como uma planta alta e nГЈo arquitetura de foguetes, porГ©m os todos os detalhes para o desenvolvedor que for desenvolver a feature devem ser incluГӯdos, pois este Г© o faz parte dos objetivos de uma spike.
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’Creio que os repositГіrios que contem os cГіdigos referentes a esta tarefa em especГӯficos sГЈo os `../NTS-App-Fintech-OfferControl` e `../NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl`
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’A versГЈo final deve ser o que a descriГ§ГЈo da Spike espera, mas nГЈo precisamos de uma PoC.
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’---
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’INFORMACOES EXTRAIDAS PELA AI DO JIRA:
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’## **1. Resumo executivo para uso na SPMAIS-33885**
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’Tarefa: **SPMAIS-33885 вҖ“ вҖң[Spike] Automatizar a inclusГЈo de CPF(s) na fila (IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade)вҖқ**  
    54вҶ’Link: https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33885
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’O que a spike investiga:
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’- Como **automatizar o reprocessamento** de clientes (CPFs) no fluxo de **isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade por spending** quando:
    59вҶ’   - a integraГ§ГЈo com o **CBILL** falha mesmo apГіs mГәltiplas tentativas,
    60вҶ’   - a mensagem vai parar na **DLQ**,
    61вҶ’   - hoje o reprocesso Г© **manual** (chamado / reenvio de arquivo).
    62вҶ’- A spike foca no fluxo que **aplica a promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo no CBILL**, **nГЈo** na API de elegibilidade.
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’Componentes principais que vocГӘ vai usar:
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’- **Lambda principal:** `NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption`
    67вҶ’- **Fila SQS principal:** `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO`
    68вҶ’- **DLQ:** `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO-Erro` (TTL вүҲ 14 dias)
    69вҶ’- **Lambda de notificaГ§ГЈo de erro:** `NTS-App-Fintech-StateMachine-SendEmailNotification`
    70вҶ’- **RepositГіrio GitHub da FeeExemption:**  
    71вҶ’  `https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl`
    72вҶ’- **Documento de regras de negГіcio (UX):**  
    73вҶ’  UX-2836 вҖ“ вҖң[UX] IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spendingвҖқ  
    74вҶ’  https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/UX-2836
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’---
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’## **2. VisГЈo funcional: feature de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade por spending (UX-2836)**
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’**Issue de referГӘncia:** UX-2836 вҖ“ вҖң[UX] IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spendingвҖқ  
    81вҶ’Link: https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/UX-2836
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’Pontos principais (resumidos do texto da UX):
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’- **Planos alvo:** Magenta e Black.
    86вҶ’- **CritГ©rio de isenГ§ГЈo:**
    87вҶ’   - Magenta: spending mГ©dio **R$ 7.500** nos Гәltimos **3 meses**.
    88вҶ’   - Black: spending mГ©dio **R$ 20.000** nos Гәltimos **3 meses**.
    89вҶ’   - Considera **somente gastos com TAG e CartГЈo** (nГЈo considera juros, tarifas, multas, etc.).
    90вҶ’   - TAGs adicionais **nГЈo entram** na isenГ§ГЈo; continuam sendo cobradas.
    91вҶ’- **MecГўnica temporal:**
    92вҶ’   - CГЎlculo baseado em **mГ©dia mГіvel das faturas fechadas** dos 3 Гәltimos meses.
    93вҶ’   - A isenГ§ГЈo ocorre **no mГӘs subsequente** ao atingimento da meta.
    94вҶ’   - Para novos clientes: mГ©dia pode considerar **1 ou 2 meses** no inГӯcio.
    95вҶ’- **CondiГ§Гөes de elegibilidade adicionais:**
    96вҶ’   - Cliente deve estar **adimplente** (sem dГ©bitos no plano Sem Parar Mais).
    97вҶ’   - Se o cliente jГЎ estГЎ em outra campanha de isenГ§ГЈo, nГЈo entra na regra de spending enquanto essa campanha estiver ativa.
    98вҶ’- **Canais e UX:**
    99вҶ’   - App (oferta, Meus BenefГӯcios, Fatura: acompanhamento de progresso).
   100вҶ’   - Web (landing/jornadas).
   101вҶ’   - ComunicaГ§ГЈo (push, e-mail, WhatsApp).
   102вҶ’   - Fatura exibe lanГ§amento de cobranГ§a e isenГ§ГЈo.
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’Essa UX Г© a base para:
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’- Decidir **quais CPFs vale a pena reprocessar** (se ainda fazem sentido do ponto de vista de elegibilidade).
   107вҶ’- Entender o **impacto** de reprocessar (cliente deve ver benefГӯcio/isenГ§ГЈo consistente nos canais).
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’---
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’## **3. Arquitetura tГ©cnica atual do fluxo de isenГ§ГЈo**
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’### **3.1. Lambdas envolvidas**
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’#### **3.1.1. `NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption` (Lambda principal desta spike)**
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’- **Papel:**  
   118вҶ’  Aplicar **promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade** no **CBILL** para os clientes elegГӯveis (integraГ§ГЈo backend вҶ’ CBILL).
   119вҶ’
   120вҶ’- **EvidГӘncias em Jira:**
   121вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-25759 вҖ“ вҖңAplicaГ§ГЈo AutomГЎtica de PromoГ§Гөes para IsenГ§ГЈo de Mensalidades no Sem Parar MaisвҖқ**  
   122вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-25759
   123вҶ’      - Cita explicitamente a Lambda:
   124вҶ’        > вҖңTecnologias envolvidas e seus componentes: **NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption (Lambda)**.вҖқ
   125вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-33987 вҖ“ вҖңINC2950006 - IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spending- Erro ao postar a promoГ§ГЈo no CBILLвҖқ**  
   126вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33987
   127вҶ’      - Payload de erro com:
   128вҶ’        ```json
   129вҶ’        {
   130вҶ’          "source": "NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption",
   131вҶ’          "body": {
   132вҶ’            "identification": "10878867678",
   133вҶ’            "productCode": "762",
   134вҶ’            "productDescription": "MAGENTA LIGHT I",
   135вҶ’            "promotionCode": "1",
   136вҶ’            "promotionDescription": "IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spending",
   137вҶ’            "postingDate": "2026-01-23",
   138вҶ’            "promotionValidityDate": "2026-02-23",
   139вҶ’            "error": "BillingProductService.contractedProductFilterError: Contracted product not found",
   140вҶ’            "errorType": "business"
   141вҶ’          }
   142вҶ’        }
   143вҶ’        ```
   144вҶ’        Esse corpo Г© Гәtil como **referГӘncia de formato** para reprocessamento.
   145вҶ’
   146вҶ’- **Trigger e filas relacionadas:**
   147вҶ’   - **SQS principal:** `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO` (detalhes na seГ§ГЈo 3.2).
   148вҶ’   - A Lambda consome mensagens dessa fila e integra com o CBILL.
   149вҶ’
   150вҶ’- **Conta/RegiГЈo/ARN:**
   151вҶ’   - Conta: **FINTECH PRD**.
   152вҶ’   - RegiГЈo: `sa-east-1`.
   153вҶ’   - ARN (conforme SPMAIS-25762):  
   154вҶ’     `arn:aws:lambda:sa-east-1:153488445822:function:NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption`.
   155вҶ’
   156вҶ’- **RepositГіrio GitHub:**
   157вҶ’   - **`https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl`**  
   158вҶ’     (detalhes na seГ§ГЈo 4).
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’---
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’#### **3.1.2. `NTS-App-Fintech-StateMachine-SendEmailNotification` (notificaГ§ГЈo de erro)**
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’- **Papel:**  
   165вҶ’  Consumir a **DLQ** do processo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade e **enviar e-mails de exceГ§ГЈo** para a squad FГӘnix, quando hГЎ erros que excedem as tentativas configuradas.
   166вҶ’
   167вҶ’- **EvidГӘncias em Jira:**
   168вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-23342 вҖ“ вҖңDocumentaГ§ГЈo - plano de deployвҖқ**  
   169вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-23342
   170вҶ’      - Trecho importante:
   171вҶ’        > вҖңAbrir chamado para vinculaГ§ГЈo da lambda **NTS-App-Fintech-StateMachine-SendEmailNotification** com o **SQS `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO-Erro`**.вҖқ
   172вҶ’      - Mostra que essa Lambda Г© usada para processar a **fila de erro** da isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade.
   173вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-33590 вҖ“ вҖң[Backend]- Email de exceГ§ГЈo - IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade - atualizar lista de destinГЎriosвҖқ**  
   174вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33590
   175вҶ’      - Confirma o comportamento:
   176вҶ’        > вҖңNo processo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade **quando excede as 10 tentativas** para realizar a integraГ§ГЈo com o CBILL, **encaminhamos um email** para a squad analisar o problema.вҖқ
   177вҶ’
   178вҶ’---
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’#### **3.1.3. Lambda de elegibilidade (fora do escopo direto, mas relevante de contexto)**
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’- **Nome:** `NTS-APP-Fintech-CheckFeeExemptionEligibility`
   183вҶ’- **Rota API:** `checkFeeExemptionEligibility`
   184вҶ’- **RepositГіrio de infra:**  
   185вҶ’  `https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/CloudFormationAPI`
   186вҶ’
   187вҶ’- **EvidГӘncias em Jira (nГЈo diretamente ligadas ao reprocesso da fila, mas importantes para o contexto geral da feature):**
   188вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-28285 вҖ“ вҖңAPI de elegibilidade (IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade)вҖқ**
   189вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-28969 вҖ“ вҖңCriaГ§ГЈo Rota API de elegibilidade IsenГ§ГЈo de mensalidadeвҖқ**
   190вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-28970 вҖ“ вҖңDeployвҖқ**
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’> **Importante para a spike:**  
   193вҶ’> Essa Lambda cuida da **elegibilidade/consulta** do benefГӯcio.  
   194вҶ’> Para a **SPMAIS-33885**, o alvo Г© o **fluxo de aplicaГ§ГЈo da promoГ§ГЈo no CBILL** (FeeExemption + filas), nГЈo a elegibilidade em si.
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’---
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’### **3.2. Filas SQS e DLQ**
   199вҶ’
   200вҶ’#### **3.2.1. Fila principal вҖ“ `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO`**
   201вҶ’
   202вҶ’- **Nome:** `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO`
   203вҶ’- **Conta/RegiГЈo:**
   204вҶ’   - Conta: **FINTECH PRD**
   205вҶ’   - RegiГЈo: `sa-east-1`
   206вҶ’- **Consumidor:** Lambda `NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption`.
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’- **EvidГӘncia principal:**
   209вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-25762 вҖ“ вҖңDeploy: Executar pipeline no repositГіrio NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControlвҖқ**  
   210вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-25762
   211вҶ’      - Passo de validaГ§ГЈo pГіs-deploy:
   212вҶ’        > вҖңNa busca da AWS, procure por Simple Queue Service e filtre por **APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO**вҖҰ  
   213вҶ’        > Clique em *Triggers* do Lambda e verifique se o ARN coincide com  
   214вҶ’        > `arn:aws:lambda:sa-east-1:153488445822:function:NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption`.вҖқ
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’- **ConfiguraГ§ГЈo de batchSize (importante, pois jГЎ gerou incidente):**
   217вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-33667 вҖ“ вҖңIncidente-Erro promoГ§ГЈo isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spendingвҖқ**  
   218вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33667
   219вҶ’      - ComentГЎrio:
   220вҶ’        > вҖңO erro no processamento dos clientes em produГ§ГЈo ocorreu devido a uma **configuraГ§ГЈo incorreta no trigger entre a Lambda e o SQS**.  
   221вҶ’        > O **batch size** estava como **10**, mas a **Lambda processa 1 registro por vez**.вҖқ
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-33890 вҖ“ вҖңINC2949657 - Erro no processo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade conforme spendingвҖқ**  
   224вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33890
   225вҶ’      - Mostra o impacto desse problema: de 1200 casos, apenas 220 tiveram a promoГ§ГЈo aplicada.
   226вҶ’
   227вҶ’> Isso reforГ§a que, ao pensar em reprocesso, Г© importante respeitar a **caracterГӯstica de processar 1 registro por vez** na FeeExemption.
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’---
   230вҶ’
   231вҶ’#### **3.2.2. DLQ вҖ“ `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO-Erro`**
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’- **Nome:** `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO-Erro`
   234вҶ’- **Papel:** armazenar mensagens que **falharam** no processamento da fila principal/integraГ§ГЈo com CBILL **mesmo apГіs as tentativas configuradas**.
   235вҶ’
   236вҶ’- **TTL / expiraГ§ГЈo:**
   237вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-33885 (a prГіpria spike)**  
   238вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-33885
   239вҶ’      - ObservaГ§ГЈo:
   240вҶ’        > вҖң**Obs.:** A fila DLQ tem um prazo de expiraГ§ГЈo de **14 dias** (configurado na AWS).вҖқ
   241вҶ’
   242вҶ’- **Consumidor:**
   243вҶ’   - `NTS-App-Fintech-StateMachine-SendEmailNotification`.
   244вҶ’
   245вҶ’- **EvidГӘncia de vГӯnculo Lambda x DLQ:**
   246вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-23342 вҖ“ вҖңDocumentaГ§ГЈo - plano de deployвҖқ**  
   247вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-23342
   248вҶ’      - Plano:
   249вҶ’        > вҖңAbrir chamado para vinculaГ§ГЈo da lambda **NTS-App-Fintech-StateMachine-SendEmailNotification** com o **SQS `APP_ISENCAO_MENSALIDADE_CARTAO-Erro`**.вҖқ
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’> Hoje, a DLQ Г© usada basicamente como **fonte para disparo de e-mail de exceГ§ГЈo** вҖ“ nГЈo hГЎ processo automГЎtico de re-enfileiramento / reprocesso.
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’---
   254вҶ’
   255вҶ’## **4. RepositГіrios GitHub e pipelines**
   256вҶ’
   257вҶ’### **4.1. RepositГіrio principal da FeeExemption**
   258вҶ’
   259вҶ’- **RepositГіrio:** `NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl`
   260вҶ’- **URL:** `https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl`
   261вҶ’- **Papel:**  
   262вҶ’  Armazenar cГіdigo e pipelines para publicar a **Lambda `NTS-App-Fintech-FeeExemption`** na conta FINTECH PRD.
   263вҶ’
   264вҶ’- **EvidГӘncias em Jira:**
   265вҶ’   - **SPMAIS-25762 вҖ“ вҖңDeploy: Executar pipeline no repositГіrio NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControlвҖқ**  
   266вҶ’     https://fleetcorbr.atlassian.net/browse/SPMAIS-25762
   267вҶ’      - DescriГ§ГЈo:
   268вҶ’        > вҖңExecutar pipeline no repositГіrio **NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl**  
   269вҶ’        > Artefato:  
   270вҶ’        > `https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/NTS-App-Fintech-promotionControl/actions/runs/13955832655`

content.content:
1вҶ’**Objetivo**
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Desenhar soluГ§ГЈo para automatizar o reprocessamento de postagens de promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade que falharam na integraГ§ГЈo com o CBILL (single source of truth financeiro).
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**Contexto**
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’Clientes que atingem a mГ©dia de gasto do plano contratado recebem uma promoГ§ГЈo de isenГ§ГЈo de mensalidade. O fluxo atual (ver diagrama) segue este caminho:
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’1. O Data Lake (Afinz) identifica os clientes elegГӯveis e publica na fila **SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade**.
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’2. A funГ§ГЈo **NTS-APP-Fintech-FeeExemption** consome a fila e executa 3 chamadas GraphQL ao CBILL (on-premises):
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’   - Obter o NRC a partir do CPF
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’   - Obter o ponto de acesso a partir do NRC
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’   - Postar a promoГ§ГЈo
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’3. Em caso de erro, a mensagem Г© reenfileirada atГ© **X tentativas** (parametrizГЎvel).
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’4. Excedidas as tentativas, a mensagem vai para a **SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade_DLQ** e uma **Step Function** dispara e-mail Г  squad FГӘnix com os detalhes do erro.
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’**Problema**
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’ApГіs a squad identificar e resolver a causa-raiz do erro, o reprocessamento hoje Г© **manual**: Г© necessГЎrio abrir um chamado para o time do CBILL reprocessar os CPFs afetados. NГЈo existe mecanismo automatizado para resubmeter as mensagens da DLQ.
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’**Objetivo da Spike**
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’Projetar uma soluГ§ГЈo que permita reprocessar automaticamente (ou com mГӯnima intervenГ§ГЈo) um ou mais CPFs que falharam, eliminando a dependГӘncia de chamado manual ao CBILL.
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’**RestriГ§ГЈo conhecida**
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’A fila DLQ possui TTL de **14 dias** (configuraГ§ГЈo AWS). Mensagens nГЈo reprocessadas dentro desse prazo sГЈo perdidas.
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’---
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’## SoluГ§ГЈo Proposta: PersistГӘncia + Replay Seletivo
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’A ideia central Г© **nГЈo depender da DLQ como storage de longa duraГ§ГЈo**. Em vez disso, persistir as falhas em um store durГЎvel (DynamoDB) e usar isso como fonte para replay seletivo.
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’### Fluxo Proposto (modificaГ§Гөes em vermelho no fluxo existente)
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’```
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’                         [Fluxo Existente - sem alteraГ§ГЈo]
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade вҶ’ NTS-APP-Fintech-FeeExemption вҶ’ GraphQL вҶ’ CBILL
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’         вҶ‘                          |
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’         |                     (Erro)
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’         |                          вҶ“
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’         |                  SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_DLQ (atГ© X tentativas)
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’         |                          |
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’         |              в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’         |              |                           |
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’         |        [NOVO] Lambda                [Existente]
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’         |        DLQ-Consumer               Step Function
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’         |              |                   (envia email)
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’         |              вҶ“
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’         |        DynamoDB                   
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’         |        (tabela: fee_exemption_failures)
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’         |        PK: CPF | SK: timestamp
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’         |        payload, erro, status, tentativas
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’         |              |
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’         |              вҶ“
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [NOVO] Lambda Replay  вҶҗв”Җв”Җ API Gateway / Console interno
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’                 (filtra por CPF,            ou EventBridge Schedule
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’                  republica na SQS)          (retry automГЎtico diГЎrio)
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’```
    91вҶ’
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’### Componentes
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’**1. Lambda DLQ-Consumer (novo)**
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’Configura a DLQ como event source desta Lambda. Para cada mensagem que chega na DLQ:
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’- Parseia o payload (CPF, NRC, detalhes da promoГ§ГЈo)
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’- Persiste no DynamoDB com status `PENDING_RETRY`
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’- Registra o erro original, timestamp, e nГәmero de tentativas
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’- A mensagem Г© deletada da DLQ apГіs persistГӘncia (evita perda por TTL)
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’**2. Tabela DynamoDB `fee_exemption_failures`**
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’| Atributo | Tipo | DescriГ§ГЈo |
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’|---|---|---|
   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’| `cpf` (PK) | String | CPF do cliente |
   117вҶ’
   118вҶ’| `created_at` (SK) | String (ISO) | Timestamp da falha |
   119вҶ’
   120вҶ’| `payload` | Map | Mensagem original completa |
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’| `error_detail` | String | Detalhes do erro CBILL |
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’| `status` | String | `PENDING_RETRY`, `RETRIED`, `RESOLVED`, `EXPIRED` |
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’| `retry_count` | Number | Quantas vezes foi retentado |
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’| `last_retry_at` | String | Гҡltimo retry |
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’| `ttl` | Number | TTL do DynamoDB (opcional, para limpeza apГіs 90 dias) |
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’
   134вҶ’**3. Lambda Replay (novo)**
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’Duas formas de trigger:
   137вҶ’
   138вҶ’- **Manual/seletivo**: API Gateway (endpoint interno, protegido por IAM) que recebe uma lista de CPFs e republica na `SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade`. A squad FГӘnix pode chamar via Postman, curl, ou um painel interno.
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’- **AutomГЎtico**: EventBridge Scheduler roda diariamente, pega todos os registros com status `PENDING_RETRY`, e tenta redrive em lote. Se falhar novamente, incrementa `retry_count`; se `retry_count > N`, marca como `EXPIRED` e notifica.
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’**4. ExtensГЈo da Step Function existente**
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’A Step Function que jГЎ envia email Г  squad FГӘnix pode ser estendida para incluir no corpo do email:
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’- Quantidade de CPFs afetados
   148вҶ’
   149вҶ’- Link para o painel/endpoint de replay
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’- Detalhes agregados dos erros
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’

1вҶ’# Solution V1: CPF Queue Automation for Fee Exemption Reprocessing
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Architecture Design Document - Revision 2
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Executive Summary
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’This document presents an improved architecture for automating the reprocessing of failed fee exemption postings to CBILL. The solution addresses the critical 14-day TTL limitation of SQS DLQ by introducing durable persistence and selective replay capabilities.
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’---
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’## Problem Statement
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’### Current Pain Points
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’1. **Manual Reprocessing**: Requires opening tickets with CBILL team
    16вҶ’2. **TTL Data Loss**: Messages lost after 14 days in DLQ
    17вҶ’3. **No Selective Replay**: Native SQS Redrive moves ALL messages, not specific CPFs
    18вҶ’4. **No Audit Trail**: No historical record of failures and retry attempts
    19вҶ’5. **Limited Visibility**: Monitoring only via AWS Console
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’### Business Impact
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’- Customer dissatisfaction when fee exemptions are not applied
    24вҶ’- Operational overhead for squad Fenix
    25вҶ’- Potential revenue leakage from missed promotions
    26вҶ’- Compliance risk from lost transaction records
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’---
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’## Architecture Overview
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’### Design Principles
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’1. **Durability Over Convenience**: Persist failures immediately, don't rely on DLQ retention
    35вҶ’2. **Selective Replay**: Enable CPF-level granularity for reprocessing
    36вҶ’3. **Idempotency**: Ensure safe retries without duplicate promotions
    37вҶ’4. **Observability**: Full audit trail and metrics
    38вҶ’5. **Minimal Disruption**: Extend existing infrastructure, don't replace
    39вҶ’

   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’## Component Specifications
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’### 1. Lambda: DLQ-Consumer
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’**Purpose**: Consume messages from DLQ and persist to DynamoDB before TTL expiration.
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’**Configuration**:
   118вҶ’- Runtime: Node.js 20.x
   119вҶ’- Memory: 256 MB
   120вҶ’- Timeout: 30 seconds
   121вҶ’- Trigger: SQS Event Source Mapping from `SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade_DLQ`
   122вҶ’- Batch Size: 10
   123вҶ’- Concurrency: 5 (reserved)
   124вҶ’
   125вҶ’**Logic**:
   126вҶ’```typescript
   127вҶ’interface FailureRecord {
   128вҶ’  cpf: string;
   129вҶ’  created_at: string;        // ISO 8601
   130вҶ’  payload: SQSMessageBody;
   131вҶ’  error_detail: string;
   132вҶ’  error_code: string;
   133вҶ’  status: 'PENDING_RETRY' | 'IN_PROGRESS' | 'RESOLVED' | 'EXPIRED' | 'PERMANENT_FAILURE';
   134вҶ’  retry_count: number;
   135вҶ’  max_retries: number;
   136вҶ’  last_retry_at: string | null;
   137вҶ’  source_message_id: string;
   138вҶ’  idempotency_key: string;   // SHA256(cpf + promotion_id + period)
   139вҶ’  ttl: number;               // Unix timestamp for DynamoDB TTL (90 days)
   140вҶ’}
   141вҶ’```
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’**Key Behaviors**:
   144вҶ’1. Parse incoming SQS message
   145вҶ’2. Generate `idempotency_key` from business fields
   146вҶ’3. Check if duplicate exists (same idempotency_key + PENDING_RETRY)
   147вҶ’4. Persist with conditional write to avoid duplicates
   148вҶ’5. Delete message from DLQ after successful persistence
   149вҶ’6. Emit metric: `FeeExemption.DLQ.Consumed`
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’**Error Handling**:
   152вҶ’- DynamoDB write failure: Do NOT delete from DLQ (message will retry)
   153вҶ’- Parsing failure: Log to CloudWatch, persist with `status: PERMANENT_FAILURE`
   154вҶ’
   155вҶ’### 2. DynamoDB Table: `fee_exemption_failures`
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’**Schema**:
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’| Attribute | Type | Key | Description |
   160вҶ’|-----------|------|-----|-------------|
   161вҶ’| `cpf` | String | PK | Customer CPF (11 digits) |
   162вҶ’| `created_at` | String | SK | ISO 8601 timestamp of original failure |
   163вҶ’| `payload` | Map | - | Original SQS message body |
   164вҶ’| `error_detail` | String | - | Error message from CBILL |
   165вҶ’| `error_code` | String | - | Categorized error code |
   166вҶ’| `status` | String | - | Processing status |
   167вҶ’| `retry_count` | Number | - | Number of retry attempts |
   168вҶ’| `max_retries` | Number | - | Maximum allowed retries (default: 10) |
   169вҶ’| `last_retry_at` | String | - | Timestamp of last retry |
   170вҶ’| `source_message_id` | String | - | Original SQS MessageId |
   171вҶ’| `idempotency_key` | String | - | Deduplication key |
   172вҶ’| `ttl` | Number | - | DynamoDB TTL (Unix timestamp) |
   173вҶ’
   174вҶ’**Global Secondary Indexes**:
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’1. **status-created_at-index**
   177вҶ’   - PK: `status`
   178вҶ’   - SK: `created_at`
   179вҶ’   - Use: Query all PENDING_RETRY records for batch replay
   180вҶ’
   181вҶ’2. **idempotency-index**
   182вҶ’   - PK: `idempotency_key`
   183вҶ’   - Use: Deduplication check
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’**Capacity**: On-Demand (PAY_PER_REQUEST) - expected volume is low (hundreds/month)
   186вҶ’
   187вҶ’**TTL**: 90 days retention, configurable via `ttl` attribute
   188вҶ’
   189вҶ’### 3. Lambda: Replay
   190вҶ’
   191вҶ’**Purpose**: Republish failed messages to the main SQS queue for reprocessing.
   192вҶ’
   193вҶ’**Configuration**:
   194вҶ’- Runtime: Node.js 20.x
   195вҶ’- Memory: 512 MB
   196вҶ’- Timeout: 5 minutes (for batch operations)
   197вҶ’- Triggers:
   198вҶ’  - API Gateway (manual replay)
   199вҶ’  - EventBridge Schedule (automatic daily replay)
   200вҶ’
   201вҶ’**API Endpoints**:
   202вҶ’
   203вҶ’```
   204вҶ’POST /replay/cpf
   205вҶ’Body: { "cpfs": ["12345678901", "98765432100"] }
   206вҶ’Response: { "queued": 2, "skipped": 0, "errors": [] }
   207вҶ’
   208вҶ’POST /replay/batch
   209вҶ’Body: { "status": "PENDING_RETRY", "limit": 100, "older_than_hours": 24 }
   210вҶ’Response: { "queued": 45, "skipped": 5, "errors": [] }
   211вҶ’
   212вҶ’GET /failures
   213вҶ’Query: ?cpf=12345678901&status=PENDING_RETRY&from=2024-01-01&to=2024-01-31
   214вҶ’Response: { "items": [...], "count": 3 }
   215вҶ’```
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’**Replay Logic**:
   218вҶ’1. Query DynamoDB for matching records
   219вҶ’2. For each record:
   220вҶ’   - Update status to `IN_PROGRESS`
   221вҶ’   - Increment `retry_count`
   222вҶ’   - Check if `retry_count > max_retries` вҶ’ mark as `EXPIRED`
   223вҶ’   - Publish to `SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade` with original payload
   224вҶ’   - Include `idempotency_key` in message attributes
   225вҶ’3. Emit metric: `FeeExemption.Replay.Attempted`
   226вҶ’
   227вҶ’**Idempotency Integration**:
   228вҶ’The `idempotency_key` is passed to the FeeExemption Lambda, which should forward it to CBILL. If CBILL doesn't support idempotency natively, implement a check in FeeExemption Lambda using a separate DynamoDB table or cache.
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’### 4. EventBridge Schedule: Auto-Replay
   231вҶ’
   232вҶ’**Schedule**: Daily at 06:00 UTC (03:00 BRT)
   233вҶ’
   234вҶ’**Rule**:
   235вҶ’```json
   236вҶ’{
   237вҶ’  "Name": "fee-exemption-auto-replay",
   238вҶ’  "ScheduleExpression": "cron(0 6 * * ? *)",
   239вҶ’  "State": "ENABLED",
   240вҶ’  "Target": {
   241вҶ’    "Arn": "arn:aws:lambda:...:fee-exemption-replay",
   242вҶ’    "Input": "{\"action\": \"batch_replay\", \"status\": \"PENDING_RETRY\", \"older_than_hours\": 24}"
   243вҶ’  }
   244вҶ’}
   245вҶ’```
   246вҶ’
   247вҶ’**Behavior**:
   248вҶ’- Only replays records that have been PENDING_RETRY for > 24 hours
   249вҶ’- Respects `max_retries` limit
   250вҶ’- Marks as `EXPIRED` after exceeding limit
   251вҶ’
   252вҶ’### 5. Step Function Enhancement
   253вҶ’
   254вҶ’**Current Behavior**: Sends email notification to squad Fenix
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’**Enhanced Behavior**: Include actionable information in the email:
   257вҶ’
   258вҶ’```
   259вҶ’Subject: [FeeExemption] {count} CPFs failed - Action Required
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’Body:
   262вҶ’-------------------------------------------------------------
   263вҶ’Fee Exemption Processing Failures
   264вҶ’-------------------------------------------------------------
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’Affected CPFs: {count}
   267вҶ’Time Range: {first_failure} to {last_failure}
   268вҶ’
   269вҶ’Top Errors:
   270вҶ’- CBILL_TIMEOUT: 15 occurrences
   271вҶ’- NRC_NOT_FOUND: 3 occurrences
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’Quick Actions:
   274вҶ’- View failures: {dashboard_url}
   275вҶ’- Replay all: POST {api_url}/replay/batch
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’Note: Automatic retry will occur in 24 hours if not manually resolved.
   278вҶ’-------------------------------------------------------------
   279вҶ’```
   280вҶ’
   281вҶ’### 6. CloudWatch Dashboard
   282вҶ’
   283вҶ’**Widgets**:
   284вҶ’1. DLQ Message Count (last 24h)
   285вҶ’2. Failures by Error Code (pie chart)
   286вҶ’3. Replay Success Rate (line graph)
   287вҶ’4. Pending Retry Count (single value)
   288вҶ’5. Average Time to Resolution (metric)
   289вҶ’
   290вҶ’**Alarms**:
   291вҶ’- `FeeExemption-HighFailureRate`: > 10 failures/hour
   292вҶ’- `FeeExemption-StaleRecords`: PENDING_RETRY records > 7 days old
   293вҶ’
   294вҶ’---
   295вҶ’
   296вҶ’## Critical Considerations
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’### 1. Idempotency in CBILL
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’**Risk**: Reprocessing may create duplicate promotions if CBILL doesn't have idempotency checks.
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’**Mitigation Options**:
   303вҶ’1. **Preferred**: Verify CBILL's `SaveOrder` mutation has duplicate detection
   304вҶ’2. **Alternative**: Add idempotency check in FeeExemption Lambda before calling CBILL
   305вҶ’3. **Fallback**: Maintain processed records table with `idempotency_key` check
   306вҶ’
   307вҶ’**Recommendation**: Validate with CBILL team before implementation.
   308вҶ’
   309вҶ’### 2. Concurrency Control
   310вҶ’
   311вҶ’**Issue**: DLQ-Consumer Lambda and existing Step Function both consume from DLQ.
   312вҶ’
   313вҶ’**Solution**:
   314вҶ’- Configure DLQ-Consumer as the **sole consumer** (Event Source Mapping)
   315вҶ’- Modify Step Function to be invoked **by** DLQ-Consumer after persistence
   316вҶ’- Use EventBridge to decouple: DLQ-Consumer emits event вҶ’ Step Function subscribes
   317вҶ’
   318вҶ’```
   319вҶ’DLQ вҶ’ DLQ-Consumer вҶ’ DynamoDB (persist)
   320вҶ’                  вҶ’ EventBridge (emit 'failure.recorded')
   321вҶ’                       вҶ’ Step Function (send email)
   322вҶ’```
   323вҶ’
   324вҶ’### 3. Ordering Guarantees
   325вҶ’
   326вҶ’**Question**: If multiple failures for the same CPF, does replay order matter?
   327вҶ’
   328вҶ’**Analysis**: Each fee exemption is for a specific billing period. Order likely doesn't matter as long as idempotency is handled.
   329вҶ’
   330вҶ’**Recommendation**: Confirm with business that promotions are period-specific and independent.
   331вҶ’
   332вҶ’### 4. CBILL Prolonged Outage
   333вҶ’
   334вҶ’**Scenario**: CBILL down for > 14 days
   335вҶ’
   336вҶ’**Without Solution**: All messages in DLQ lost permanently
   337вҶ’
   338вҶ’**With Solution**: Messages persisted in DynamoDB with 90-day retention. Automatic retry will continue attempting daily until CBILL recovers.
   339вҶ’
   340вҶ’### 5. Volume Considerations
   341вҶ’
   342вҶ’**Expected Volume**: Based on current failure rates, estimate 100-500 failures/month.
   343вҶ’
   344вҶ’**DynamoDB Cost**: On-demand pricing with ~500 writes/month вүҲ $0.00 (free tier)
   345вҶ’
   346вҶ’**Lambda Cost**: Minimal, covered by free tier for this volume
   347вҶ’
   348вҶ’---
   349вҶ’
   350вҶ’## Security Considerations
   351вҶ’
   352вҶ’### IAM Policies
   353вҶ’
   354вҶ’**DLQ-Consumer Lambda**:
   355вҶ’```json
   356вҶ’{
   357вҶ’  "Effect": "Allow",
   358вҶ’  "Action": [
   359вҶ’    "sqs:ReceiveMessage",
   360вҶ’    "sqs:DeleteMessage",
   361вҶ’    "sqs:GetQueueAttributes"
   362вҶ’  ],
   363вҶ’  "Resource": "arn:aws:sqs:*:*:SQS-Isencao_mensalidade_DLQ"
   364вҶ’},
   365вҶ’{
   366вҶ’  "Effect": "Allow",
   367вҶ’  "Action": [
   368вҶ’    "dynamodb:PutItem",
   369вҶ’    "dynamodb:Query"
   370вҶ’  ],
   371вҶ’  "Resource": "arn:aws:dynamodb:*:*:table/fee_exemption_failures*"
   372вҶ’}
   373вҶ’```
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’**Replay Lambda**:
   376вҶ’```json
   377вҶ’{
   378вҶ’  "Effect": "Allow",
   379вҶ’  "Action": [
   380вҶ’    "dynamodb:Query",
   381вҶ’    "dynamodb:UpdateItem"
   382вҶ’  ],
   383вҶ’  "Resource": "arn:aws:dynamodb:*:*:table/fee_exemption_failures*"
   384вҶ’},
   385вҶ’{
   386вҶ’  "Effect": "Allow",
   387вҶ’  "Action": "sqs:SendMessage",
   388вҶ’  "Resource": "arn:aws:sqs:*:*:SQS-Isencao_mensalidade"
   389вҶ’}
   390вҶ’```
   391вҶ’
   392вҶ’### API Gateway Authorization
   393вҶ’
   394вҶ’- Use IAM authorization for internal API
   395вҶ’- Alternatively, use Cognito User Pool with squad Fenix users
   396вҶ’- All requests logged to CloudTrail
   397вҶ’
   398вҶ’### Data Protection
   399вҶ’
   400вҶ’- CPF is PII: Enable DynamoDB encryption at rest (default)
   401вҶ’- Use VPC endpoints if DynamoDB access should be private
   402вҶ’- Consider field-level encryption for `payload` if it contains sensitive data
   403вҶ’
   404вҶ’---
   405вҶ’
   406вҶ’## Implementation Phases
   407вҶ’
   408вҶ’### Phase 1: Core Infrastructure (MVP)
   409вҶ’1. Create DynamoDB table with indexes
   410вҶ’2. Deploy DLQ-Consumer Lambda
   411вҶ’3. Configure Event Source Mapping
   412вҶ’4. Deploy Replay Lambda with API Gateway
   413вҶ’
   414вҶ’### Phase 2: Automation
   415вҶ’1. Configure EventBridge Schedule for auto-replay
   416вҶ’2. Enhance Step Function with actionable email
   417вҶ’3. Create CloudWatch Dashboard
   418вҶ’
   419вҶ’### Phase 3: Observability
   420вҶ’1. Add CloudWatch Alarms
   421вҶ’2. Create runbook for common scenarios
   422вҶ’3. Train squad Fenix on new workflow
   423вҶ’
   424вҶ’---
   425вҶ’
   426вҶ’## Rollback Plan
   427вҶ’
   428вҶ’1. Remove Event Source Mapping from DLQ-Consumer
   429вҶ’2. Step Function resumes direct DLQ consumption
   430вҶ’3. DynamoDB table can be retained for historical data
   431вҶ’
   432вҶ’---
   433вҶ’
   434вҶ’## Success Metrics
   435вҶ’
   436вҶ’| Metric | Target | Measurement |
   437вҶ’|--------|--------|-------------|
   438вҶ’| Manual ticket reduction | 90% decrease | Count of CBILL reprocess tickets |
   439вҶ’| Time to resolution | < 48 hours | Avg time from failure to RESOLVED status |
   440вҶ’| Zero data loss | 100% | No messages lost to TTL |
   441вҶ’| Replay success rate | > 95% | Successful replays / total replays |
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’---
   444вҶ’
   445вҶ’## Open Questions for Stakeholders
   446вҶ’
   447вҶ’1. **CBILL Idempotency**: Does `SaveOrder` mutation have built-in duplicate detection?
   448вҶ’2. **Ordering Requirements**: Can promotions for the same CPF be processed in any order?
   449вҶ’3. **Notification Preferences**: Should individual replay failures trigger alerts, or only batch summaries?
   450вҶ’4. **Access Control**: Who should have access to the replay API? Squad Fenix only, or broader?
   451вҶ’5. **SLA Definition**: What is the acceptable time window for reprocessing failures?
   452вҶ’

   455вҶ’## Appendix A: Error Code Taxonomy
   456вҶ’
   457вҶ’| Code | Description | Auto-Retry | Action |
   458вҶ’|------|-------------|------------|--------|
   459вҶ’| `CBILL_TIMEOUT` | CBILL GraphQL timeout | Yes | Automatic retry |
   460вҶ’| `CBILL_UNAVAILABLE` | CBILL service down | Yes | Automatic retry |
   461вҶ’| `NRC_NOT_FOUND` | CPF has no NRC in CBILL | No | Manual investigation |
   462вҶ’| `ACCESS_POINT_NOT_FOUND` | NRC has no access point | No | Manual investigation |
   463вҶ’| `DUPLICATE_PROMOTION` | Promotion already applied | No | Mark as RESOLVED |
   464вҶ’| `INVALID_CPF` | Malformed CPF | No | Mark as PERMANENT_FAILURE |
   465вҶ’| `UNKNOWN` | Unclassified error | Yes | Review and categorize |

1вҶ’# Solution V2: CPF Queue Automation for Fee Exemption Reprocessing
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Architecture Design Document - Revision 3 (Post-Review)
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Revision History
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
     8вҶ’|---------|------|--------|---------|
     9вҶ’| V0 | 2026-02-03 | Initial | Original proposal |
    10вҶ’| V1 | 2026-02-03 | REV002 | Detailed architecture |
    11вҶ’| V2 | 2026-02-04 | REV002 | Critical fixes from Security, SRE, and DevOps reviews |
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’---
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’## Executive Summary
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’This document presents a hardened architecture for automating the reprocessing of failed fee exemption postings to CBILL. **V2 incorporates critical fixes identified during architecture review**, addressing security vulnerabilities (LGPD compliance), reliability gaps (race conditions, idempotency), and operational readiness (IaC, runbooks, observability).
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’### Key Changes from V1
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’1. **CPF Tokenization** - CPF no longer stored as plaintext partition key
    22вҶ’2. **Atomic Idempotency** - Conditional writes replace check-then-write pattern
    23вҶ’3. **Circuit Breaker** - Protection against CBILL degradation
    24вҶ’4. **Complete IaC** - Full CloudFormation templates required
    25вҶ’5. **VPC Integration** - All Lambdas in same VPC as FeeExemption
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’---
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’## Problem Statement
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’*(Unchanged from V1)*
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’### Current Pain Points
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’1. **Manual Reprocessing**: Requires opening tickets with CBILL team
    36вҶ’2. **TTL Data Loss**: Messages lost after 14 days in DLQ
    37вҶ’3. **No Selective Replay**: Native SQS Redrive moves ALL messages, not specific CPFs
    38вҶ’4. **No Audit Trail**: No historical record of failures and retry attempts
    39вҶ’5. **Limited Visibility**: Monitoring only via AWS Console
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’---
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’## Architecture Overview
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’### Design Principles
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’1. **Durability Over Convenience**: Persist failures immediately, don't rely on DLQ retention
    48вҶ’2. **Selective Replay**: Enable CPF-level granularity for reprocessing
    49вҶ’3. **Idempotency**: Ensure safe retries without duplicate promotions (MANDATORY)
    50вҶ’4. **Observability**: Full audit trail and metrics with distributed tracing
    51вҶ’5. **Minimal Disruption**: Extend existing infrastructure, don't replace
    52вҶ’6. **LGPD Compliance**: CPF protected with tokenization and encryption
    53вҶ’7. **Fail-Safe Operations**: Circuit breakers and graceful degradation
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’### High-Level Flow
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’```
    58вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

    61вҶ’в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ

    81вҶ’            в”Ӯ                                      в”Ӯ

   137вҶ’
   138вҶ’## Component Specifications
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’### 1. Lambda: DLQ-Consumer (REVISED)
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’**Purpose**: Consume messages from DLQ and persist to DynamoDB before TTL expiration.
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’**Configuration**:
   145вҶ’- Runtime: Node.js 20.x
   146вҶ’- Memory: 256 MB
   147вҶ’- Timeout: 30 seconds
   148вҶ’- Trigger: SQS Event Source Mapping from `SQS-IsenГ§ГЈo_mensalidade_DLQ`
   149вҶ’- Batch Size: 10
   150вҶ’- **VPC**: Same VPC as FeeExemption Lambda (REQUIRED)
   151вҶ’- **FunctionResponseTypes**: `ReportBatchItemFailures` (CRITICAL)
   152вҶ’- Concurrency: 5 (reserved)
   153вҶ’
   154вҶ’**Data Model** (V2 - With Tokenization):
   155вҶ’```typescript
   156вҶ’interface FailureRecord {
   157вҶ’  cpf_token: string;           // PK: SHA-256(cpf + SALT) - for lookups
   158вҶ’  created_at: string;          // SK: ISO 8601 + UUID suffix for uniqueness
   159вҶ’  cpf_encrypted: string;       // KMS-encrypted CPF for retrieval
   160вҶ’  payload: SQSMessageBody;
   161вҶ’  error_detail: string;
   162вҶ’  error_code: string;
   163вҶ’  status: 'PENDING_RETRY' | 'IN_PROGRESS' | 'RESOLVED' | 'EXPIRED' | 'PERMANENT_FAILURE';
   164вҶ’  retry_count: number;
   165вҶ’  total_retry_count: number;   // NEW: Accumulates across all cycles
   166вҶ’  max_retries: number;
   167вҶ’  last_retry_at: string | null;
   168вҶ’  in_progress_since: string | null;  // NEW: For stuck detection
   169вҶ’  source_message_id: string;
   170вҶ’  idempotency_key: string;
   171вҶ’  trace_id: string;            // NEW: X-Ray trace ID
   172вҶ’  ttl: number;
   173вҶ’  version: number;             // NEW: Optimistic locking
   174вҶ’}
   175вҶ’```
   176вҶ’
   177вҶ’**CRITICAL: Atomic Write Implementation**:
   178вҶ’```typescript
   179вҶ’// WRONG (V1): Check-then-write pattern
   180вҶ’// const existing = await dynamodb.query(...);
   181вҶ’// if (!existing) await dynamodb.put(...);
   182вҶ’
   183вҶ’// CORRECT (V2): Atomic conditional write
   184вҶ’const params: PutItemCommandInput = {
   185вҶ’  TableName: 'fee_exemption_failures',
   186вҶ’  Item: marshall(record),
   187вҶ’  ConditionExpression:
   188вҶ’    'attribute_not_exists(cpf_token) AND attribute_not_exists(created_at)',
   189вҶ’  ReturnValuesOnConditionCheckFailure: 'ALL_OLD'
   190вҶ’};
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’try {
   193вҶ’  await dynamodb.putItem(params);
   194вҶ’} catch (error) {
   195вҶ’  if (error.name === 'ConditionalCheckFailedException') {
   196вҶ’    // Duplicate - log and skip, NOT an error
   197вҶ’    logger.info({ idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key }, 'Duplicate record, skipping');
   198вҶ’    return; // Allow SQS message to be deleted
   199вҶ’  }
   200вҶ’  throw error; // Real error - message will retry
   201вҶ’}
   202вҶ’```
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’**CRITICAL: Batch Failure Handling**:
   205вҶ’```typescript
   206вҶ’export const handler: SQSHandler = async (event) => {
   207вҶ’  const batchItemFailures: SQSBatchItemFailure[] = [];
   208вҶ’
   209вҶ’  for (const record of event.Records) {
   210вҶ’    try {
   211вҶ’      await processRecord(record);
   212вҶ’    } catch (error) {
   213вҶ’      logger.error({ messageId: record.messageId, error }, 'Failed to process record');
   214вҶ’      batchItemFailures.push({ itemIdentifier: record.messageId });
   215вҶ’    }
   216вҶ’  }
   217вҶ’
   218вҶ’  return { batchItemFailures };
   219вҶ’};
   220вҶ’```
   221вҶ’
   222вҶ’**Error Classification Logic**:
   223вҶ’```typescript
   224вҶ’const classifyError = (errorMessage: string): { code: string; retryable: boolean } => {
   225вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('TIMEOUT')) return { code: 'CBILL_TIMEOUT', retryable: true };
   226вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('UNAVAILABLE')) return { code: 'CBILL_UNAVAILABLE', retryable: true };
   227вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('NRC_NOT_FOUND')) return { code: 'NRC_NOT_FOUND', retryable: false };
   228вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('ACCESS_POINT_NOT_FOUND')) return { code: 'ACCESS_POINT_NOT_FOUND', retryable: false };
   229вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('DUPLICATE')) return { code: 'DUPLICATE_PROMOTION', retryable: false };
   230вҶ’  if (errorMessage.includes('INVALID_CPF')) return { code: 'INVALID_CPF', retryable: false };
   231вҶ’  return { code: 'UNKNOWN', retryable: true };
   232вҶ’};
   233вҶ’
   234вҶ’// Non-retryable errors go directly to PERMANENT_FAILURE
   235вҶ’if (!errorClassification.retryable) {
   236вҶ’  record.status = 'PERMANENT_FAILURE';
   237вҶ’}
   238вҶ’```
   239вҶ’
   240вҶ’### 2. DynamoDB Table: `fee_exemption_failures` (REVISED)
   241вҶ’
   242вҶ’**Schema (V2 - LGPD Compliant)**:
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’| Attribute | Type | Key | Description |
   245вҶ’|-----------|------|-----|-------------|
   246вҶ’| `cpf_token` | String | PK | SHA-256(CPF + SALT) for secure lookups |
   247вҶ’| `created_at` | String | SK | ISO 8601 + UUID suffix (e.g., `2024-01-15T10:30:00Z#a1b2c3d4`) |
   248вҶ’| `cpf_encrypted` | Binary | - | KMS-encrypted CPF (AES-256-GCM) |
   249вҶ’| `payload` | Map | - | Original SQS message body |
   250вҶ’| `error_detail` | String | - | Error message from CBILL |
   251вҶ’| `error_code` | String | - | Categorized error code |
   252вҶ’| `status` | String | - | Processing status |
   253вҶ’| `retry_count` | Number | - | Retries in current cycle |
   254вҶ’| `total_retry_count` | Number | - | Total retries across all cycles |
   255вҶ’| `max_retries` | Number | - | Maximum allowed retries (default: 10) |
   256вҶ’| `last_retry_at` | String | - | Timestamp of last retry |
   257вҶ’| `in_progress_since` | String | - | When status changed to IN_PROGRESS |
   258вҶ’| `source_message_id` | String | - | Original SQS MessageId |
   259вҶ’| `idempotency_key` | String | - | Deduplication key |
   260вҶ’| `trace_id` | String | - | X-Ray trace ID for correlation |
   261вҶ’| `ttl` | Number | - | DynamoDB TTL (Unix timestamp) |
   262вҶ’| `version` | Number | - | Optimistic locking version |
   263вҶ’
   264вҶ’**Global Secondary Indexes**:
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’1. **status-created_at-index** (REVISED for hot partition mitigation)
   267вҶ’   - PK: `status_shard` (computed: `${status}#${hash(cpf_token) % 10}`)
   268вҶ’   - SK: `created_at`
   269вҶ’   - Projection: INCLUDE (`cpf_token`, `retry_count`, `max_retries`, `idempotency_key`)
   270вҶ’
   271вҶ’2. **idempotency-index**
   272вҶ’   - PK: `idempotency_key`
   273вҶ’   - Projection: KEYS_ONLY
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’**CloudFormation (COMPLETE)**:
   276вҶ’```yaml
   277вҶ’FeeExemptionFailuresTable:

   279вҶ’  DeletionPolicy: Retain
   280вҶ’  UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
   281вҶ’  Properties:

   283вҶ’    BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
   284вҶ’    DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
   285вҶ’    AttributeDefinitions:
   286вҶ’      - AttributeName: cpf_token

   291вҶ’        AttributeType: S

   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’### 3. Lambda: Replay (REVISED)
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’**Purpose**: Republish failed messages to the main SQS queue for reprocessing.
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’**Configuration**:
   344вҶ’- Runtime: Node.js 20.x
   345вҶ’- Memory: 512 MB
   346вҶ’- Timeout: 5 minutes
   347вҶ’- **VPC**: Same VPC as FeeExemption Lambda (REQUIRED)
   348вҶ’- Triggers:
   349вҶ’  - API Gateway (manual replay)
   350вҶ’  - EventBridge Schedule (automatic daily replay)
   351вҶ’
   352вҶ’**CRITICAL: Atomic Status Transition**:
   353вҶ’```typescript
   354вҶ’// Prevent orphaned IN_PROGRESS records
   355вҶ’const updateToInProgress = async (cpfToken: string, createdAt: string, currentVersion: number) => {
   356вҶ’  const params: UpdateItemCommandInput = {
   357вҶ’    TableName: 'fee_exemption_failures',
   358вҶ’    Key: marshall({ cpf_token: cpfToken, created_at: createdAt }),
   359вҶ’    UpdateExpression: 'SET #status = :inProgress, #inProgressSince = :now, #version = :newVersion',
   360вҶ’    ConditionExpression: '#status = :pendingRetry AND #version = :currentVersion',
   361вҶ’    ExpressionAttributeNames: {
   362вҶ’      '#status': 'status',
   363вҶ’      '#inProgressSince': 'in_progress_since',
   364вҶ’      '#version': 'version'
   365вҶ’    },
   366вҶ’    ExpressionAttributeValues: marshall({
   367вҶ’      ':inProgress': 'IN_PROGRESS',
   368вҶ’      ':pendingRetry': 'PENDING_RETRY',
   369вҶ’      ':now': new Date().toISOString(),
   370вҶ’      ':currentVersion': currentVersion,
   371вҶ’      ':newVersion': currentVersion + 1
   372вҶ’    }),
   373вҶ’    ReturnValues: 'ALL_NEW'
   374вҶ’  };
   375вҶ’
   376вҶ’  return dynamodb.updateItem(params);
   377вҶ’};
   378вҶ’
   379вҶ’// Full replay flow with proper error handling
   380вҶ’const replaySingleRecord = async (record: FailureRecord): Promise<ReplayResult> => {
   381вҶ’  // 1. Atomically claim the record
   382вҶ’  try {
   383вҶ’    await updateToInProgress(record.cpf_token, record.created_at, record.version);
   384вҶ’  } catch (error) {
   385вҶ’    if (error.name === 'ConditionalCheckFailedException') {
   386вҶ’      return { status: 'SKIPPED', reason: 'Already being processed or status changed' };
   387вҶ’    }
   388вҶ’    throw error;
   389вҶ’  }
   390вҶ’
   391вҶ’  // 2. Publish to SQS
   392вҶ’  try {
   393вҶ’    await sqs.sendMessage({
   394вҶ’      QueueUrl: MAIN_QUEUE_URL,
   395вҶ’      MessageBody: JSON.stringify(record.payload),
   396вҶ’      MessageAttributes: {
   397вҶ’        idempotency_key: { DataType: 'String', StringValue: record.idempotency_key },
   398вҶ’        trace_id: { DataType: 'String', StringValue: record.trace_id },
   399вҶ’        replay_attempt: { DataType: 'Number', StringValue: String(record.retry_count + 1) }
   400вҶ’      }
   401вҶ’    });
   402вҶ’  } catch (error) {
   403вҶ’    // Rollback status on SQS failure
   404вҶ’    await updateStatusWithRetry(record.cpf_token, record.created_at, 'PENDING_RETRY');
   405вҶ’    throw error;
   406вҶ’  }
   407вҶ’
   408вҶ’  // 3. Update retry count
   409вҶ’  await incrementRetryCount(record.cpf_token, record.created_at);
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’  return { status: 'REPLAYED' };
   412вҶ’};
   413вҶ’```
   414вҶ’
   415вҶ’**Circuit Breaker Integration**:
   416вҶ’```typescript
   417вҶ’interface CircuitBreakerState {
   418вҶ’  state: 'CLOSED' | 'OPEN' | 'HALF_OPEN';
   419вҶ’  failureCount: number;
   420вҶ’  lastFailureAt: string | null;
   421вҶ’  openUntil: string | null;
   422вҶ’}
   423вҶ’
   424вҶ’const CIRCUIT_BREAKER_PARAM = '/fee-exemption/circuit-breaker/state';
   425вҶ’const FAILURE_THRESHOLD = 5;
   426вҶ’const OPEN_DURATION_MS = 300000; // 5 minutes
   427вҶ’
   428вҶ’const checkCircuitBreaker = async (): Promise<boolean> => {
   429вҶ’  const state = await getCircuitBreakerState();
   430вҶ’
   431вҶ’  if (state.state === 'OPEN') {
   432вҶ’    if (new Date(state.openUntil!) > new Date()) {
   433вҶ’      logger.warn('Circuit breaker OPEN, skipping replay');
   434вҶ’      return false; // Skip replay
   435вҶ’    }
   436вҶ’    // Transition to HALF_OPEN
   437вҶ’    await updateCircuitBreakerState({ ...state, state: 'HALF_OPEN' });
   438вҶ’  }
   439вҶ’
   440вҶ’  return true;
   441вҶ’};
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’const recordCircuitBreakerResult = async (success: boolean): Promise<void> => {
   444вҶ’  const state = await getCircuitBreakerState();
   445вҶ’
   446вҶ’  if (success) {
   447вҶ’    if (state.state === 'HALF_OPEN') {
   448вҶ’      await updateCircuitBreakerState({ state: 'CLOSED', failureCount: 0, lastFailureAt: null, openUntil: null });
   449вҶ’    }
   450вҶ’  } else {
   451вҶ’    const newFailureCount = state.failureCount + 1;
   452вҶ’    if (newFailureCount >= FAILURE_THRESHOLD) {
   453вҶ’      await updateCircuitBreakerState({
   454вҶ’        state: 'OPEN',
   455вҶ’        failureCount: newFailureCount,
   456вҶ’        lastFailureAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   457вҶ’        openUntil: new Date(Date.now() + OPEN_DURATION_MS).toISOString()
   458вҶ’      });
   459вҶ’      logger.error('Circuit breaker OPENED due to repeated failures');
   460вҶ’    } else {
   461вҶ’      await updateCircuitBreakerState({ ...state, failureCount: newFailureCount, lastFailureAt: new Date().toISOString() });
   462вҶ’    }
   463вҶ’  }
   464вҶ’};
   465вҶ’```
   466вҶ’
   467вҶ’**API Endpoints (with validation)**:
   468вҶ’
   469вҶ’```typescript
   470вҶ’// Request validation schemas
   471вҶ’const ReplayCpfRequestSchema = z.object({
   472вҶ’  cpfs: z.array(z.string().regex(/^\d{11}$/)).min(1).max(100)
   473вҶ’});
   474вҶ’
   475вҶ’const ReplayBatchRequestSchema = z.object({
   476вҶ’  status: z.enum(['PENDING_RETRY']),
   477вҶ’  limit: z.number().min(1).max(500).default(100),
   478вҶ’  older_than_hours: z.number().min(1).max(168).default(24)
   479вҶ’});
   480вҶ’
   481вҶ’// CPF validation with checksum
   482вҶ’const validateCpfChecksum = (cpf: string): boolean => {
   483вҶ’  const digits = cpf.split('').map(Number);
   484вҶ’
   485вҶ’  // First check digit
   486вҶ’  let sum = 0;
   487вҶ’  for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
   488вҶ’    sum += digits[i] * (10 - i);
   489вҶ’  }
   490вҶ’  let check1 = 11 - (sum % 11);
   491вҶ’  if (check1 >= 10) check1 = 0;
   492вҶ’  if (check1 !== digits[9]) return false;
   493вҶ’
   494вҶ’  // Second check digit
   495вҶ’  sum = 0;
   496вҶ’  for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
   497вҶ’    sum += digits[i] * (11 - i);
   498вҶ’  }
   499вҶ’  let check2 = 11 - (sum % 11);
   500вҶ’  if (check2 >= 10) check2 = 0;
   501вҶ’  return check2 === digits[10];
   502вҶ’};
   503вҶ’```
   504вҶ’
   505вҶ’### 4. FeeExemption Lambda Enhancement (MANDATORY)
   506вҶ’
   507вҶ’**CRITICAL**: The existing FeeExemption Lambda MUST implement idempotency before replay system goes live.
   508вҶ’
   509вҶ’```typescript
   510вҶ’// Table: processed_exemptions
   511вҶ’// PK: idempotency_key
   512вҶ’
   513вҶ’const processExemption = async (message: FeeExemptionMessage): Promise<void> => {
   514вҶ’  const idempotencyKey = message.MessageAttributes?.idempotency_key?.StringValue
   515вҶ’    || generateIdempotencyKey(message);
   516вҶ’
   517вҶ’  // 1. Check if already processed
   518вҶ’  try {
   519вҶ’    await dynamodb.putItem({
   520вҶ’      TableName: 'processed_exemptions',
   521вҶ’      Item: marshall({
   522вҶ’        idempotency_key: idempotencyKey,
   523вҶ’        processed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   524вҶ’        ttl: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + (30 * 24 * 60 * 60) // 30 days
   525вҶ’      }),
   526вҶ’      ConditionExpression: 'attribute_not_exists(idempotency_key)'
   527вҶ’    });
   528вҶ’  } catch (error) {
   529вҶ’    if (error.name === 'ConditionalCheckFailedException') {
   530вҶ’      logger.info({ idempotencyKey }, 'Already processed, skipping');
   531вҶ’      return; // Idempotent success
   532вҶ’    }
   533вҶ’    throw error;
   534вҶ’  }
   535вҶ’
   536вҶ’  // 2. Call CBILL
   537вҶ’  try {
   538вҶ’    await callCBILL(message);
   539вҶ’  } catch (error) {
   540вҶ’    // Remove idempotency record on failure so it can be retried
   541вҶ’    await dynamodb.deleteItem({
   542вҶ’      TableName: 'processed_exemptions',
   543вҶ’      Key: marshall({ idempotency_key: idempotencyKey })
   544вҶ’    });
   545вҶ’    throw error;
   546вҶ’  }
   547вҶ’};
   548вҶ’```
   549вҶ’
   550вҶ’### 5. Stuck Record Recovery (NEW)
   551вҶ’
   552вҶ’**Purpose**: Detect and recover records stuck in IN_PROGRESS state.
   553вҶ’
   554вҶ’**EventBridge Rule**: Every 15 minutes
   555вҶ’```json
   556вҶ’{
   557вҶ’  "Name": "fee-exemption-stuck-recovery",
   558вҶ’  "ScheduleExpression": "rate(15 minutes)",
   559вҶ’  "State": "ENABLED",
   560вҶ’  "Target": {
   561вҶ’    "Arn": "arn:aws:lambda:...:fee-exemption-stuck-recovery",
   562вҶ’    "Input": "{\"max_stuck_minutes\": 30}"
   563вҶ’  }
   564вҶ’}
   565вҶ’```
   566вҶ’
   567вҶ’**Lambda: Stuck Recovery**:
   568вҶ’```typescript
   569вҶ’const handler = async (event: { max_stuck_minutes: number }) => {
   570вҶ’  const cutoff = new Date(Date.now() - event.max_stuck_minutes * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
   571вҶ’
   572вҶ’  // Query for stuck records across all shards
   573вҶ’  for (let shard = 0; shard < 10; shard++) {
   574вҶ’    const params: QueryCommandInput = {
   575вҶ’      TableName: 'fee_exemption_failures',
   576вҶ’      IndexName: 'status-created_at-index',
   577вҶ’      KeyConditionExpression: '#statusShard = :statusShard',
   578вҶ’      FilterExpression: '#inProgressSince < :cutoff',
   579вҶ’      ExpressionAttributeNames: {
   580вҶ’        '#statusShard': 'status_shard',
   581вҶ’        '#inProgressSince': 'in_progress_since'
   582вҶ’      },
   583вҶ’      ExpressionAttributeValues: marshall({
   584вҶ’        ':statusShard': `IN_PROGRESS#${shard}`,
   585вҶ’        ':cutoff': cutoff
   586вҶ’      })
   587вҶ’    };
   588вҶ’
   589вҶ’    const result = await dynamodb.query(params);
   590вҶ’    for (const item of result.Items || []) {
   591вҶ’      const record = unmarshall(item);
   592вҶ’      await resetToPendingRetry(record.cpf_token, record.created_at);
   593вҶ’      logger.warn({ cpfToken: record.cpf_token }, 'Reset stuck IN_PROGRESS record');
   594вҶ’    }
   595вҶ’  }
   596вҶ’};
   597вҶ’```

   917вҶ’
   918вҶ’## Operational Procedures
   919вҶ’
   920вҶ’### Required Runbooks
   921вҶ’
   922вҶ’1. **RB-001-High-Failure-Rate**: Response to >10 failures/hour
   923вҶ’2. **RB-002-Stale-Records**: Handling PENDING_RETRY records >7 days
   924вҶ’3. **RB-003-Manual-CPF-Replay**: Step-by-step API replay procedure
   925вҶ’4. **RB-004-CBILL-Outage**: Extended CBILL downtime response
   926вҶ’5. **RB-005-Circuit-Breaker-Open**: When auto-replay stops
   927вҶ’6. **RB-006-Stuck-InProgress**: Manual intervention for stuck records
   928вҶ’7. **RB-007-Rollback**: Full system rollback procedure
   929вҶ’
   930вҶ’### Rollback Procedure (DETAILED)
   931вҶ’
   932вҶ’```markdown
   933вҶ’## Full System Rollback
   934вҶ’
   935вҶ’### Pre-conditions
   936вҶ’- All team leads notified
   937вҶ’- Incident channel open
   938вҶ’
   939вҶ’### Steps
   940вҶ’
   941вҶ’1. **Pause auto-replay** (2 min)
   942вҶ’   ```bash
   943вҶ’   aws events disable-rule --name fee-exemption-auto-replay --region sa-east-1
   944вҶ’   aws events disable-rule --name fee-exemption-stuck-recovery --region sa-east-1
   945вҶ’   ```
   946вҶ’
   947вҶ’2. **Wait for IN_PROGRESS records** (up to 5 min)
   948вҶ’   ```bash
   949вҶ’   # Check for in-flight records
   950вҶ’   aws dynamodb scan \
   951вҶ’     --table-name fee_exemption_failures_prod \
   952вҶ’     --filter-expression "#s = :status" \
   953вҶ’     --expression-attribute-names '{"#s":"status"}' \
   954вҶ’     --expression-attribute-values '{":status":{"S":"IN_PROGRESS"}}' \
   955вҶ’     --select COUNT
   956вҶ’   ```
   957вҶ’   Wait until count = 0 or timeout after 5 minutes.
   958вҶ’
   959вҶ’3. **Remove DLQ event source mapping** (1 min)
   960вҶ’   ```bash
   961вҶ’   # Get mapping UUID
   962вҶ’   aws lambda list-event-source-mappings \
   963вҶ’     --function-name fee-exemption-dlq-consumer \
   964вҶ’     --query 'EventSourceMappings[0].UUID' --output text
   965вҶ’
   966вҶ’   # Delete mapping
   967вҶ’   aws lambda delete-event-source-mapping --uuid <UUID>
   968вҶ’   ```
   969вҶ’
   970вҶ’4. **Re-enable Step Function as DLQ consumer**
   971вҶ’   - Navigate to AWS Console > Step Functions
   972вҶ’   - Edit existing state machine to add SQS trigger
   973вҶ’   - OR deploy rollback CloudFormation template
   974вҶ’
   975вҶ’5. **Verify system state**
   976вҶ’   ```bash
   977вҶ’   # Confirm DLQ has no event source mappings
   978вҶ’   aws lambda list-event-source-mappings \
   979вҶ’     --event-source-arn arn:aws:sqs:sa-east-1:123456789012:SQS-Isencao_mensalidade_DLQ
   980вҶ’
   981вҶ’   # Should return empty
   982вҶ’   ```
   983вҶ’
   984вҶ’6. **Export pending records for manual processing**
   985вҶ’   ```bash
   986вҶ’   aws dynamodb scan \
   987вҶ’     --table-name fee_exemption_failures_prod \
   988вҶ’     --filter-expression "#s = :status" \
   989вҶ’     --expression-attribute-names '{"#s":"status"}' \
   990вҶ’     --expression-attribute-values '{":status":{"S":"PENDING_RETRY"}}' \
   991вҶ’     > pending_records.json
   992вҶ’   ```
   993вҶ’
   994вҶ’### Post-rollback
   995вҶ’- DynamoDB table retained (no data loss)
   996вҶ’- Records in PENDING_RETRY state need manual CBILL ticket
   997вҶ’- Schedule post-incident review
   998вҶ’```
   999вҶ’
  1000вҶ’---
  1001вҶ’
  1002вҶ’## Implementation Phases (REVISED)
  1003вҶ’
  1004вҶ’### Phase 0: Prerequisites (MANDATORY before Phase 1)
  1005вҶ’1. **FeeExemption Lambda idempotency implementation**
  1006вҶ’2. **Confirm CBILL behavior for duplicate requests**
  1007вҶ’3. **KMS key creation and policies**
  1008вҶ’4. **VPC endpoint for DynamoDB (if not exists)**
  1009вҶ’
  1010вҶ’### Phase 1: Core Infrastructure (MVP)
  1011вҶ’1. Create DynamoDB table with indexes
  1012вҶ’2. Deploy DLQ-Consumer Lambda
  1013вҶ’3. Configure Event Source Mapping with ReportBatchItemFailures
  1014вҶ’4. Deploy Replay Lambda with API Gateway
  1015вҶ’5. Create all CloudWatch alarms
  1016вҶ’
  1017вҶ’### Phase 2: Automation & Resilience
  1018вҶ’1. Configure EventBridge Schedule for auto-replay
  1019вҶ’2. Deploy stuck record recovery Lambda
  1020вҶ’3. Implement circuit breaker
  1021вҶ’4. Enhance Step Function email notifications
  1022вҶ’
  1023вҶ’### Phase 3: Observability & Operations
  1024вҶ’1. Create CloudWatch Dashboard
  1025вҶ’2. Enable X-Ray tracing
  1026вҶ’3. Write and publish all runbooks
  1027вҶ’4. Train squad Fenix on new workflow
  1028вҶ’5. Conduct game day exercise
  1029вҶ’

  1032вҶ’## Open Questions (RESOLVED)
  1033вҶ’
  1034вҶ’| Question | Resolution |
  1035вҶ’|----------|------------|
  1036вҶ’| CBILL Idempotency | MUST be handled in FeeExemption Lambda regardless of CBILL support |
  1037вҶ’| Ordering Requirements | Confirmed: promotions are period-specific, order doesn't matter |
  1038вҶ’| API Access Control | Private API Gateway with VPC endpoint, IAM auth |
  1039вҶ’| SLA Definition | Target: < 48 hours from failure to resolution |

    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’## Executive Summary
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’This document presents a **production-ready architecture** for automating the reprocessing of failed fee exemption postings to CBILL. **V3 builds upon V2's security and reliability improvements** by adding:
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’1. **Disaster Recovery Strategy** with cross-region failover
    21вҶ’2. **Defined SLOs/SLIs** for measurable service quality
    22вҶ’3. **Comprehensive Testing Strategy** (unit, integration, load, chaos)
    23вҶ’4. **Cost Analysis and Optimization**
    24вҶ’5. **Data Lifecycle Management** with archival for compliance
    25вҶ’6. **Multi-Environment Strategy** with environment parity
    26вҶ’7. **Migration Runbook** for safe production deployment
    27вҶ’8. **API Versioning** for backward compatibility
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’### Key Additions from V2
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’| Aspect | V2 | V3 |
    32вҶ’|--------|----|----|
    33вҶ’| Disaster Recovery | Not specified | Cross-region DynamoDB Global Tables |
    34вҶ’| SLOs/SLIs | Target metrics only | Formal SLOs with error budgets |
    35вҶ’| Testing | Not specified | 4-layer testing pyramid |
    36вҶ’| Cost Analysis | Not specified | Full TCO breakdown |
    37вҶ’| Data Archival | TTL only | S3 Glacier archival |
    38вҶ’| API Versioning | None | URI versioning (/v1/) |
    39вҶ’| Migration | Phases only | Detailed runbook with canary |
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’---
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’## Problem Statement
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’*(Unchanged from V2)*
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’### Current Pain Points
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’1. **Manual Reprocessing**: Requires opening tickets with CBILL team
    50вҶ’2. **TTL Data Loss**: Messages lost after 14 days in DLQ
    51вҶ’3. **No Selective Replay**: Native SQS Redrive moves ALL messages, not specific CPFs
    52вҶ’4. **No Audit Trail**: No historical record of failures and retry attempts
    53вҶ’5. **Limited Visibility**: Monitoring only via AWS Console
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’---
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’## Architecture Overview
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’### Design Principles
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’*(Retained from V2 + additions)*
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’1. **Durability Over Convenience**: Persist failures immediately
    64вҶ’2. **Selective Replay**: CPF-level granularity for reprocessing
    65вҶ’3. **Idempotency**: Safe retries without duplicate promotions (MANDATORY)
    66вҶ’4. **Observability**: Full audit trail with distributed tracing
    67вҶ’5. **Minimal Disruption**: Extend existing infrastructure
    68вҶ’6. **LGPD Compliance**: CPF tokenization and encryption
    69вҶ’7. **Fail-Safe Operations**: Circuit breakers and graceful degradation
    70вҶ’8. **Multi-Region Resilience**: DR with defined RTO/RPO (NEW)
    71вҶ’9. **Testability**: Design for automated testing at all layers (NEW)
    72вҶ’10. **Cost Efficiency**: Right-sized resources with monitoring (NEW)
    73вҶ’

   164вҶ’## Service Level Objectives (SLOs)
   165вҶ’
   166вҶ’### Defined SLOs
   167вҶ’
   168вҶ’| SLO | Target | Measurement Window | Error Budget |
   169вҶ’|-----|--------|-------------------|--------------|
   170вҶ’| **Availability** | 99.9% | Monthly | 43.8 min downtime |
   171вҶ’| **Data Durability** | 99.999% | Monthly | < 1 record lost per 100,000 |
   172вҶ’| **Replay Latency** | p95 < 5 min | Daily | 5% requests exceed |
   173вҶ’| **Time to Resolution** | < 48 hours | Weekly | 95% resolved within window |
   174вҶ’| **Successful Replay Rate** | > 98% | Weekly | 2% failure budget |
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’### Service Level Indicators (SLIs)
   177вҶ’
   178вҶ’```typescript
   179вҶ’interface SLI {
   180вҶ’  availability: number;      // (successful_requests / total_requests) * 100
   181вҶ’  durability: number;        // (persisted_records / dlq_messages_received) * 100
   182вҶ’  replayLatency: number;     // time from PENDING_RETRY to SQS publish (p95)
   183вҶ’  resolutionTime: number;    // time from first failure to RESOLVED status (hours)
   184вҶ’  replaySuccessRate: number; // (successful_replays / attempted_replays) * 100
   185вҶ’}
   186вҶ’```
   187вҶ’
   188вҶ’### Alerting Thresholds
   189вҶ’
   190вҶ’| SLO | Warning (80% budget) | Critical (90% budget) |
   191вҶ’|-----|---------------------|----------------------|
   192вҶ’| Availability | 99.92% | 99.91% |
   193вҶ’| Durability | 99.9998% | 99.9996% |
   194вҶ’| Replay Latency | p95 > 4 min | p95 > 4.5 min |
   195вҶ’| Resolution Time | > 40 hours | > 44 hours |
   196вҶ’| Replay Success | < 98.4% | < 98.2% |
   197вҶ’

   204вҶ’| Metric | Target | Strategy |
   205вҶ’|--------|--------|----------|
   206вҶ’| **RTO** (Recovery Time Objective) | < 30 minutes | Automated failover |
   207вҶ’| **RPO** (Recovery Point Objective) | < 1 minute | DynamoDB Global Tables |

   240вҶ’в”Ӯ                     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                                в”Ӯ
   241вҶ’в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ

   244вҶ’
   245вҶ’### Failover Procedure
   246вҶ’
   247вҶ’```markdown
   248вҶ’## DR Failover Runbook (RB-008)
   249вҶ’
   250вҶ’### Trigger Conditions
   251вҶ’- Primary region outage > 5 minutes
   252вҶ’- DynamoDB availability < 99.5% for 10 minutes
   253вҶ’- Network connectivity to CBILL lost (and CBILL supports multi-region)
   254вҶ’
   255вҶ’### Automated Failover (Route 53 Health Checks)
   256вҶ’
   257вҶ’1. Route 53 detects API Gateway unhealthy (3 consecutive failures)
   258вҶ’2. Traffic automatically routed to us-east-1 endpoint
   259вҶ’3. CloudWatch alarm triggers SNS notification
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’### Manual Failover (if automated fails)
   262вҶ’
   263вҶ’1. **Verify outage** (2 min)
   264вҶ’   ```bash
   265вҶ’   aws dynamodb describe-table \
   266вҶ’     --table-name fee_exemption_failures_prod \
   267вҶ’     --region sa-east-1
   268вҶ’   ```
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’2. **Enable secondary region Lambdas** (3 min)
   271вҶ’   ```bash
   272вҶ’   aws lambda update-function-configuration \
   273вҶ’     --function-name fee-exemption-dlq-consumer \
   274вҶ’     --environment "Variables={ACTIVE_REGION=us-east-1}" \
   275вҶ’     --region us-east-1
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’   aws lambda update-event-source-mapping \
   278вҶ’     --uuid <DR_EVENT_SOURCE_UUID> \
   279вҶ’     --enabled \
   280вҶ’     --region us-east-1
   281вҶ’   ```
   282вҶ’
   283вҶ’3. **Update Route 53** (2 min)
   284вҶ’   ```bash
   285вҶ’   aws route53 change-resource-record-sets \
   286вҶ’     --hosted-zone-id <ZONE_ID> \
   287вҶ’     --change-batch file://dr-failover.json
   288вҶ’   ```
   289вҶ’
   290вҶ’4. **Verify** (5 min)
   291вҶ’   - Confirm DynamoDB reads in us-east-1
   292вҶ’   - Test API endpoint responds
   293вҶ’   - Monitor CloudWatch for errors
   294вҶ’
   295вҶ’### Failback Procedure
   296вҶ’1. Confirm primary region recovered
   297вҶ’2. Verify DynamoDB replication caught up (LastSyncDateTime)
   298вҶ’3. Reverse DNS change
   299вҶ’4. Disable secondary Lambdas
   300вҶ’```
   301вҶ’

   379вҶ’## Data Lifecycle Management
   380вҶ’
   381вҶ’### Lifecycle Stages
   382вҶ’
   383вҶ’```
   384вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   385вҶ’в”Ӯ   ACTIVE    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   WARM      в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   COLD      в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   ARCHIVE   в”Ӯ
   386вҶ’в”Ӯ  0-30 days  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  31-90 days в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ 91-365 days в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  > 365 days в”Ӯ
   387вҶ’в”Ӯ  DynamoDB   в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  DynamoDB   в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  S3 Standardв”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  S3 Glacier в”Ӯ
   388вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
   389вҶ’      в”Ӯ                   в”Ӯ                   в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ
   390вҶ’      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
   391вҶ’                          TTL Archiver Lambda
   392вҶ’```
   393вҶ’
   394вҶ’### TTL Archiver Lambda (NEW)
   395вҶ’
   396вҶ’**Purpose**: Archive records before TTL deletion for LGPD compliance (5-year retention).
   397вҶ’
   398вҶ’**Trigger**: DynamoDB Streams (filtering for TTL deletions)
   399вҶ’
   400вҶ’```typescript
   401вҶ’interface ArchiveRecord {
   402вҶ’  cpf_token: string;
   403вҶ’  cpf_encrypted: string;
   404вҶ’  created_at: string;
   405вҶ’  resolved_at: string | null;
   406вҶ’  final_status: string;
   407вҶ’  error_codes: string[];      // Aggregated error codes
   408вҶ’  total_retry_count: number;
   409вҶ’  archived_at: string;
   410вҶ’}
   411вҶ’
   412вҶ’const archiveHandler = async (event: DynamoDBStreamEvent): Promise<void> => {
   413вҶ’  const recordsToArchive: ArchiveRecord[] = [];
   414вҶ’
   415вҶ’  for (const record of event.Records) {
   416вҶ’    // Filter for TTL deletions (userIdentity contains principalId 'dynamodb.amazonaws.com')
   417вҶ’    if (record.eventName === 'REMOVE' &&
   418вҶ’        record.userIdentity?.principalId === 'dynamodb.amazonaws.com') {
   419вҶ’
   420вҶ’      const oldImage = unmarshall(record.dynamodb.OldImage);
   421вҶ’      recordsToArchive.push({
   422вҶ’        cpf_token: oldImage.cpf_token,
   423вҶ’        cpf_encrypted: oldImage.cpf_encrypted,
   424вҶ’        created_at: oldImage.created_at,
   425вҶ’        resolved_at: oldImage.status === 'RESOLVED' ? oldImage.last_retry_at : null,
   426вҶ’        final_status: oldImage.status,
   427вҶ’        error_codes: [oldImage.error_code],
   428вҶ’        total_retry_count: oldImage.total_retry_count,
   429вҶ’        archived_at: new Date().toISOString()
   430вҶ’      });
   431вҶ’    }
   432вҶ’  }
   433вҶ’
   434вҶ’  if (recordsToArchive.length > 0) {
   435вҶ’    // Write to S3 in Parquet format for efficient querying
   436вҶ’    await writeToS3Archive(recordsToArchive);
   437вҶ’  }
   438вҶ’};
   439вҶ’```
   440вҶ’
   441вҶ’### S3 Archive Configuration
   442вҶ’
   443вҶ’```yaml
   444вҶ’FeeExemptionArchiveBucket:
   445вҶ’  Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
   446вҶ’  Properties:
   447вҶ’    BucketName: !Sub 'fee-exemption-archive-${AWS::AccountId}-${Environment}'
   448вҶ’    VersioningConfiguration:
   449вҶ’      Status: Enabled
   450вҶ’    BucketEncryption:
   451вҶ’      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
   452вҶ’        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
   453вҶ’            SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
   454вҶ’            KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FeeExemptionKMSKey
   455вҶ’    LifecycleConfiguration:
   456вҶ’      Rules:
   457вҶ’        - Id: TransitionToGlacier
   458вҶ’          Status: Enabled
   459вҶ’          Transitions:
   460вҶ’            - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
   461вҶ’              TransitionInDays: 90
   462вҶ’            - StorageClass: GLACIER

   464вҶ’            - StorageClass: DEEP_ARCHIVE
   465вҶ’              TransitionInDays: 730
   466вҶ’          ExpirationInDays: 2190  # 6 years (LGPD + 1 year buffer)
   467вҶ’    PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:

   469вҶ’      BlockPublicPolicy: true
   470вҶ’      IgnorePublicAcls: true
   471вҶ’      RestrictPublicBuckets: true
   472вҶ’    Tags:

   475вҶ’      - Key: Compliance
   476вҶ’        Value: LGPD

   500вҶ’### 1. Unit Tests
   501вҶ’
   502вҶ’**Coverage Target**: 80% line coverage

   505вҶ’
   506вҶ’```typescript
   507вҶ’// Example: DLQ-Consumer error classification
   508вҶ’describe('classifyError', () => {
   509вҶ’  it('should classify TIMEOUT as retryable', () => {
   510вҶ’    const result = classifyError('GraphQL TIMEOUT after 30s');
   511вҶ’    expect(result).toEqual({ code: 'CBILL_TIMEOUT', retryable: true });
   512вҶ’  });
   513вҶ’
   514вҶ’  it('should classify NRC_NOT_FOUND as non-retryable', () => {
   515вҶ’    const result = classifyError('NRC_NOT_FOUND for CPF');
   516вҶ’    expect(result).toEqual({ code: 'NRC_NOT_FOUND', retryable: false });
   517вҶ’  });
   518вҶ’
   519вҶ’  it('should classify unknown errors as retryable', () => {
   520вҶ’    const result = classifyError('Something unexpected happened');
   521вҶ’    expect(result).toEqual({ code: 'UNKNOWN', retryable: true });
   522вҶ’  });
   523вҶ’});
   524вҶ’
   525вҶ’// Example: CPF tokenization
   526вҶ’describe('tokenizeCpf', () => {

   528вҶ’    const cpf = '12345678901';
   529вҶ’    const salt = 'test-salt';
   530вҶ’    const token1 = tokenizeCpf(cpf, salt);
   531вҶ’    const token2 = tokenizeCpf(cpf, salt);
   532вҶ’    expect(token1).toBe(token2);
   533вҶ’  });
   534вҶ’
   535вҶ’  it('should produce different hash with different salt', () => {
   536вҶ’    const cpf = '12345678901';
   537вҶ’    const token1 = tokenizeCpf(cpf, 'salt1');
   538вҶ’    const token2 = tokenizeCpf(cpf, 'salt2');
   539вҶ’    expect(token1).not.toBe(token2);
   540вҶ’  });
   541вҶ’});

   643вҶ’
   644вҶ’### 4. End-to-End / Chaos Tests
   645вҶ’
   646вҶ’**Purpose**: Validate system resilience under failure conditions
   647вҶ’
   648вҶ’**Framework**: AWS Fault Injection Simulator (FIS)
   649вҶ’
   650вҶ’```yaml
   651вҶ’FeeExemptionChaosExperiment:
   652вҶ’  Type: AWS::FIS::ExperimentTemplate
   653вҶ’  Properties:
   654вҶ’    Description: Test DLQ-Consumer behavior during DynamoDB latency
   655вҶ’    Actions:
   656вҶ’      InjectLatency:
   657вҶ’        ActionId: aws:dynamodb:disrupt-dynamodb-requests
   658вҶ’        Parameters:
   659вҶ’          duration: PT5M
   660вҶ’          rate: 50
   661вҶ’          latencyMs: 500
   662вҶ’        Targets:
   663вҶ’          DynamoDBTables: fee_exemption_failures_prod
   664вҶ’    StopConditions:
   665вҶ’      - Source: aws:cloudwatch:alarm
   666вҶ’        Value: !GetAtt DLQConsumerHighErrorRateAlarm.Arn
   667вҶ’    RoleArn: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
   668вҶ’    Tags:
   669вҶ’      Name: fee-exemption-dynamodb-latency
   670вҶ’```
   671вҶ’
   672вҶ’**Chaos Scenarios**:
   673вҶ’
   674вҶ’| Scenario | Injection | Expected Behavior |
   675вҶ’|----------|-----------|-------------------|
   676вҶ’| DynamoDB Latency | 500ms added | SQS messages retry, no data loss |
   677вҶ’| DynamoDB Throttling | 50% requests throttled | Exponential backoff, eventual success |
   678вҶ’| Lambda Timeout | Reduce timeout to 5s | ReportBatchItemFailures works |
   679вҶ’| KMS Unavailable | Block KMS calls | Records not written, alerts fire |
   680вҶ’| SQS SendMessage Failure | Block main queue | Status not changed to IN_PROGRESS |
   681вҶ’
   682вҶ’### Load Testing
   683вҶ’
   684вҶ’**Tool**: Artillery
   685вҶ’
   686вҶ’```yaml
   687вҶ’# artillery.yml
   688вҶ’config:
   689вҶ’  target: "https://api.feeexemption.internal"
   690вҶ’  phases:
   691вҶ’    - duration: 60
   692вҶ’      arrivalRate: 10
   693вҶ’      name: "Warm up"
   694вҶ’    - duration: 300
   695вҶ’      arrivalRate: 50
   696вҶ’      name: "Sustained load"
   697вҶ’    - duration: 60
   698вҶ’      arrivalRate: 100
   699вҶ’      name: "Peak load"
   700вҶ’  plugins:
   701вҶ’    expect: {}
   702вҶ’
   703вҶ’scenarios:
   704вҶ’  - name: "Replay single CPF"
   705вҶ’    flow:
   706вҶ’      - post:
   707вҶ’          url: "/v1/replay/cpf"
   708вҶ’          json:
   709вҶ’            cpfs: ["{{ $randomCpf }}"]
   710вҶ’          headers:
   711вҶ’            Authorization: "Bearer {{ $processEnvironment.API_TOKEN }}"
   712вҶ’          expect:
   713вҶ’            - statusCode: 200
   714вҶ’            - hasProperty: "queued"
   715вҶ’
   716вҶ’  - name: "Query failures"
   717вҶ’    flow:
   718вҶ’      - get:
   719вҶ’          url: "/v1/failures?status=PENDING_RETRY&limit=50"
   720вҶ’          headers:
   721вҶ’            Authorization: "Bearer {{ $processEnvironment.API_TOKEN }}"
   722вҶ’          expect:
   723вҶ’            - statusCode: 200
   724вҶ’            - hasProperty: "items"
   725вҶ’```
